pending.body: `src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:229-263` swallows any error from the new next-bead selection step after a non-final reconciliation, and `src/contexts/automation_runtime/success_reconciliation.rs:428-445` has already moved the controller back to `selecting` by that point. A corrupted/missing `plan.json`, controller write failure, or other `select_next_milestone_bead*()` setup error therefore leaves the milestone stuck in `selecting` with only a transient log/stdout warning. That undermines the new safe-state contract: this path should persist a `needs_operator` or `blocked` transition with the failure reason instead of leaving an apparently healthy selecting controller.

status_summary: running: final review restart round 5 -> Plan and Implement
